backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the GPS packet tracker backend with types for unit models and report entries, and functions to upsert/query reports and manage display column mappings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two high-confidence features: fixing the CSV/XLS parser's 'Address not found' unit ID bug and auditing packet count aggregation logic in csvParser.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, utility, and page in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GPS Packet Tracker app, loading SheetJS from CDN for XLS/XLSX support and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (dashboard, entry, report) wrapped in a Layout, plus a Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/ColumnMappingSel: UI component for selecting additional CSV columns to display in the dashboard and reports, grouping columns by category and excluding built-in columns, backed by the useColumnMapping hook.
frontend/src/components/CSVImportSection: File import UI component supporting drag-and-drop CSV/XLS uploads, parsing files via csvParser utilities, displaying a debug panel, and submitting valid records to the backend via useDirectUpsert.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForm.ts: A form component for entering GPS unit packet data, supporting row-based input with validation, model/week selection, and batch submission via upsertReport mutation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with navigation links, a main content area, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/ModelSummaryCard: Displays a summary card for a specific GPS unit model showing unit count, total/stored/valid GPS packet stats, and percentage metrics.
frontend/src/components/ReportFilters.ts: Filter bar component for the report page with model, week, and unit ID selectors, plus a CSV export function for filtered report entries.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyReportTabl: A sortable table component that displays report entries with packet statistics, totals footer, and optional extra columns from a column mapping hook.
frontend/src/components/WeekNavigator.ts: A week navigation control with previous/next buttons and a display label, optionally constrained to a list of available weeks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useColumnMapping.ts: Custom React hook that manages a list of selected CSV/XLS columns, persisting the selection to localStorage and providing toggle, select-all, clear, and value-retrieval helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook that wrap DFINITY's AuthClient to manage ICP Internet Identity login state, identity persistence, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (useGetAllReports, useGetReport, useUpsertReport) for fetching and mutating GPS tracker report data via an ICP actor, along with ISO week label utility functions and model constants.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark navy/amber OKLCH CSS custom property theme along with scrollbar and utility component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page component that displays KPI summary cards (units, packets, valid GPS fixes, stored packets) and per-model summary cards for a selected ISO week, with week navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Data entry page with tabbed UI for importing GPS tracker data from CSV/XLS files or entering records manually, with a week selector and informational note about custom column mapping.
frontend/src/pages/ReportPage.tsx: React page component that displays weekly GPS tracker packet reports with filters for week, unit model, and unit ID, plus a table showing filtered entries and a custom columns notice.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Parses Waggle Portal GPS tracker CSV/XLS export files into structured records, handling per-packet event log format detection, Address/HWID column resolution, and packet count aggregation per unit ID.
frontend/src/utils/reportFilters.ts: Provides utility functions and a known-bad-values set to filter out ReportEntry objects with invalid unit IDs (e.g. negative numbers or GPS field values mistakenly stored as IDs).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, amber, chart, sidebar), OKLCH-based CSS variable tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the GPS Packet Tracker project version, known issues (broken CSV/XLS import), and two existing fix-request features targeting Address column resolution and packet count aggregation in the CSV parser.
